mapper.sql: SELECT t.id, t.title, t.description, t.category, t.status, t.priority, t.assigned_to, u1.full_name AS assigned_to_name, TO_CHAR(t.due_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS due_date, u2.full_name AS created_by_name, TO_CHAR(t.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at, TO_CHAR(t.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updated_at FROM tasks t LEFT JOIN users u1 ON u1.id = t.assigned_to LEFT JOIN users u2 ON u2.id = t.created_by
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE delete_flg = 0 AND status IN ('OPEN', 'IN_PROGRESS')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE delete_flg = 0 AND status IN ('OPEN', 'IN_PROGRESS') AND due_date = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE delete_flg = 0 AND status = 'DONE' AND updated_at >= DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW())
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks (title, description, category, priority, status, assigned_to, due_date, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{category}, #{priority}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'OPEN'), #{assignedTo}, #{dueDate}::DATE NULL, #{createdBy}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tasks SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, priority = #{priority}, status = #{status}, assigned_to = #{assignedTo}, due_date = #{dueDate}::DATENULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flg = 0
UPDATE tasks SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flg = 0
UPDATE tasks SET delete_flg = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
